title: ライバルのあの子～どんな舞台でも～

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Mejiro McQueen tells me she wants to
practice for her concerts, so I head to my office
to talk to her about it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I've been waiting for you, Trainer.
choice_data_list: Is that new racewear you're wearing?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I was given this new signature racewear in
recognition of my efforts.
choice_data_list: Is that what made you want to rehearse?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Of course, that is a factor. However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As I'm sure you're aware... I wasn't the only one to
receive a new outfit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's true. Tokai Teio did also recently receive
new signature racewear as a reward for her
efforts.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Her dance moves are unrivaled.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Which means that I must not allow her to outshine
me when we are side by side.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I need to live up to the honor of my racewear and
the support of my fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The strength of her sense of duty is apparent. We
immediately make our way to the stage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, who might that be?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There is already someone on the stage. It's Tokai
Teio.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
How are you all doing out there? Feeling good?
'Cause I'm just getting started!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us watch her perform, spellbound by
the bounce in her step and her energetic smile.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Ah, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what gives? You shoulda told me you were
here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh... I apologize. I was just a little taken aback,
that's all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It seems we had the same idea after receiving our
new racewear.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, that's true! Once I got this, I started
thinking about being number one, even on stage!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You know, your new signature racewear suits you
and all, but...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
My racewear is the coolest! I'm gonna be the
hottest thing out there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well, we shall see about that. I won't be losing to
anyone... neither on the track nor the stage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio eventually finishes her rehearsal and
leaves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen stares at Tokai Teio as she walks
away with an intensity in her eyes that I've never
seen before.
choice_data_list: I can see you really respect her.
I can see you really respect her.

Don't worry about her. You have your own
unique strengths.

Don't worry about her. You have your own
unique strengths.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen stares at Tokai Teio as she walks
away with an intensity in her eyes that I've never
seen before.
choice_data_list: I can see you really respect her.
I can see you really respect her.

Don't worry about her. You have your own
unique strengths.

Don't worry about her. You have your own
unique strengths.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, I do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't end at those dance moves we saw
either. Her cheerful demeanor, how she is quick
to take initiative...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
And that unbreakable drive... I have a lot to learn
from her.
choice_data_list:
We'll keep working hard to make sure you don't
fall behind.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Of course. After all, I swore that I wouldn't lose
on the track or the stage.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now, observe my footwork, please. I promise to
show you a dance so graceful that others pale in
comparison.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She dances on the stage, fueled by a competitive
drive. True to her words, her dance is replete with
an unparalleled elegance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You think so? Hehe, I am pleased to hear that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now then, where in particular do you think my
strengths lie?
choice_data_list:
In your graceful composure and your stoic
nature...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I see.
choice_data_list:
And your extreme sense of responsibility, which
can be worrying at times.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. It sounded nice until that last part. Do you
consider that to be a compliment?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well... I concede. I cannot deny that I may worry
you at times.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch her rehearse afterwards. Whenever I see
her overthinking her moves, we stop and take a
break.
